goal: 设计 Agent autonomy stop lines 治理模型

summary.title: 设计 agent autonomy stop lines
summary.what: 新增 docs/specs/agent-autonomy-stop-lines-v0.md，完整定义 Mainline v1 agent autonomy stop-line 治理模型：assist/handoff/review 枚举、team/local 配置层级、max_autonomy ceiling、current instruction override、status/preflight agent_authority 输出、hard gates、branch/publish/PR body 策略、skill/AGENTS 文案调整、实现切片、测试计划和关键决策点。
summary.why: 团队需要先 review Mainline 是否正式引入 agent autonomy/stop lines 作为 agent-native 工程协作治理概念，而不是继续围绕 auto_closeout 之类单字段做局部修补。先以设计文档同步，可让团队在实现前确认自治边界、团队策略和人类控制面。
summary.user_goal: 设计 Agent autonomy stop lines 治理模型

decisions.chose: 采用 agent autonomy stop lines，而不是 allow/deny 权限矩阵或 release mode。
decisions.rationale: stop line 能表达 agent 默认可推进到的生命周期边界，避免 v1 退化成复杂 ACL 或交付编排系统。

decisions.chose: 默认 autonomy 为 handoff，目标边界是 scoped commit + proposed intent，停在 push/PR 前。
decisions.rationale: Mainline 的核心价值是让 agent 形成可继承的团队记忆；纯 assist 太钝，review 作为默认又会对新团队过激。

decisions.chose: team config 定默认与 max_autonomy ceiling，local config 定本机偏好，current instruction 只在本轮临时 override 且不能越过 ceiling。
decisions.rationale: 这样 dogfood 机器可以 opt into review，但仓库/团队仍能限制 agent 不自动 PR。

decisions.chose: v1 advisory-only，通过 status/preflight 输出 agent_authority；不默认阻断现有 CLI 命令。
decisions.rationale: 先让 agent 和团队看到有效边界，避免新字段 typo 或治理设计直接导致命令不可用。

decisions.chose: 先新增 docs/specs 设计文档并以 draft PR 同步，而不是直接实现配置/schema/skill 改动。
decisions.rationale: 这是上层产品/工作流设计，需要团队先评审重要决策点，再进入 v1 垂直切片实现。

rejected.alternative: 先实现 auto_closeout 或 allow matrix 字段。
rejected.reason: 这会从具体症状或权限细节出发，掩盖真正的问题：agent 行为契约、自治边界和团队控制面。

rejected.alternative: 把 merge/release 纳入 review/autopilot mode。
rejected.reason: merge/release 改变共享 main 或发布状态，风险性质不同，应由显式当前任务触发，而不是 autonomy 默认升级。

rejected.alternative: 让 Mainline CLI 解析用户自然语言指令。
rejected.reason: current instruction 是会话级语义，应由 skill/agent 临时解释，不应写入仓库配置或由 CLI 解析。

review_notes: 验证：git diff --check 通过；文档为新增 docs/specs 设计草案，未改运行时代码。
preflight 在提交后返回 warn，原因是 goal_text_overlap 命中旧 proposed intent int_9b78be92；已检查该 intent 主要覆盖 AGENTS.md/CONTRIBUTING.md 仓库指导，本次新增 docs/specs 设计文档，文件与交付目标不同。
本 PR 预期作为 draft/design review，不包含 schema、CLI、skill 的实现改动。

architectural_claims: Mainline should expose agent autonomy as advisory stop lines through status/preflight rather than only skill prose.
Agent autonomy is modeled as assist/handoff/review stop lines, not as a command permission matrix.
Team max_autonomy is a ceiling over local preference and current-instruction upgrades.
Review autonomy stops at opened/updated PR and does not imply merge/release/post-merge cleanup.
Standalone mainline publish is positioned as sealed_local retry/metadata repair rather than a mandatory happy-path stage.
behavioral_changes: No runtime behavior changes in this doc-only PR.
If implemented later, status and preflight would report agent_authority and the Mainline skill would choose lifecycle advancement from stop lines.
security_implications: The design explicitly keeps v1 advisory-only and avoids broad Git command interception or automatic merge/release authority.
The design treats PR body marker failure, wrong remote, dirty ownership, and preflight blocks as hard stops for agent review workflows.
migration_notes: No migration for this documentation change.
Future implementation would need config backfill for missing [agent] sections and warning-only fallback for invalid autonomy values.
